TaskDescription: Subjects counted silently how often a prescribed image (one of six: television, telephone, lamp, door, window, radio) was flashed while images were flashed in random sequences Trial duration: 1.0s, ISI: 400.0ms, SOA: 400.0ms.
Instructions: Subjects were asked to count silently how often a prescribed image was flashed
InstitutionAddress: Signal Processing Institute, CH-1015 Lausanne, Switzerland
